subtasks.description: Extract Slack contract renewal dates, terms, and licensing metrics from SAM database
Query consumption database for Slack usage metrics (active users, license utilization, adoption trends) over the contract period
Reconcile SAM contract renewal data with consumption usage trends to identify mismatch patterns, forecast renewal needs, and classify renewal posture (early renew, track-and-wait, renegotiate)

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks with minimal splitting: (1) Extract is small—straightforward field retrieval from SAM contract records. (2) SQL query is mid-tier—usage trends require time-series aggregation, potentially multiple consumption tables, and per-user metrics (not trivially simple, but not requiring complex window functions). (3) Cross-recon is mid-tier—reconciles two sources, identifies usage-to-contract mismatches, and generates renewal classification and trajectory forecast; does not require complex multi-signal inference so frontier is not justified. No policy_action is needed because renewal posture classification is a reconciliation decision, not a governance policy evaluation. No multitool_plan is required because the query uses standard data connectors (SAM, consumption DB), not the enterprise tool registry.

output.sql: SELECT cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter, cf.product, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.user_id) AS active_users, SUM(cf.daily_active_seats) AS total_daily_active_seats, AVG(cf.daily_active_seats) AS avg_daily_active_seats, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.license_id) AS active_licenses, SUM(cf.amount_usd) AS total_consumption_amount, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.event_id) AS total_events, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT cf.user_id) / NULLIF(MAX(cf.daily_active_seats), 0), 2) AS utilization_rate_pct FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE LOWER(cf.product) LIKE '%slack%' GROUP BY cf.fiscal_year, cf.fiscal_quarter, cf.product ORDER BY cf.fiscal_year ASC, cf.fiscal_quarter ASC

reconciliation_notes.mongo_source: extract_sam_slack_contracts returned all null fields — SAM extraction pipeline produced no contract records for Slack
reconciliation_notes.sql_source: query_slack_usage_trends returned no rows — consumption_facts table returned no Slack-matching records or query was not executed against live data
reconciliation_notes.forecast_renewal_need: indeterminate — cannot forecast renewal trajectory without contract expiration dates or consumption baselines
recommended_actions: Re-run extract_sam_slack_contracts with explicit vendor filter for Slack and validate SAM system connectivity
Verify consumption_facts table contains rows where product LIKE '%slack%' and confirm fiscal_year/fiscal_quarter partitions are populated
Cross-check SAM contract IDs against procurement system to confirm Slack contracts exist and are active
Once data is available, compare license_count (SAM) vs active_licenses (SQL) and total_contract_value_usd vs total_consumption_amount to identify over/under-licensing
Recalculate utilization_rate_pct threshold: below 70% signals renegotiate posture, 70-90% signals track-and-wait, above 90% signals early_renew consideration
